name: evolve-lite
description: Recall, save, and share Evolve entities in Codex without MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Recall, save, and share reusable Evolve entities.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex plugin that helps you save reusable entities, publish selected guidance, subscribe to shared repos, and recall relevant memory automatically on new prompts.
defaultPrompt: Recall Evolve entities for this task.
Save new Evolve learnings from this session.
Show me the entities stored for this repo.
Publish one of my Evolve guidelines.
Subscribe to a teammate's Evolve guidelines repo.
